steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: In a field where creativity is prized, readers who see the novel as merely fictionalized true events would underestimate its creative achievement. The question asks what consequence logically follows.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The work would appear less imaginatively accomplished than it actually is—a direct consequence of readers discounting the creative invention involved. ✓
  • Choice B — Focuses on identifying real-life counterparts, which the passage does not address as a concern. ✗
  • Choice C — Prescribes decisions the author should make, which goes beyond what the passage discusses. ✗
  • Choice D — Introduces critic disagreement that is never mentioned in the passage. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
